chunks.title: Journey through Seir and Moab
chunks.reason: Narrative of the Israelites circling Mount Seir and entering Moabite territory.

chunks.title: Instructions for Moab and Zered Crossing
chunks.reason: Divine commands regarding Moab combined with the narrative of crossing the brook Zered.

chunks.title: Transition to Ammonite Territory
chunks.reason: Completion of the forty-year wandering and historical notes on the land of Ammon.

chunks.title: Conquest of Sihon King of Heshbon
chunks.reason: Divine command to take land from Sihon, the diplomatic attempt, and the subsequent military victory.
